result.summary: The page has several visual issues, primarily related to content being clipped or truncated on the right edge without clear indication that items are horizontally scrollable. Game cards and navigation labels are cut off mid-word, which can confuse users and look unpolished.

issues.description: The top navigation tab bar clips the last visible item mid-text ('Hot Ga...' instead of 'Hot Games'), with no visual affordance like a fade or arrow indicating it is horizontally scrollable.
issues.suggestion: Add a gradient fade-out or a visible scroll indicator on the right edge of the navigation tab bar to signal that more tabs are available.

issues.description: Game card thumbnails on the right side of both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' rows are cut off mid-image and mid-title (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUN MI...', 'HYPERA PYRAMID...', 'DAR WATE THE CURS...'), making them look broken rather than intentionally hinting at scrollable content.
issues.suggestion: Use a subtle fade or partial card peek with a clear visual cue (arrow, gradient) to indicate horizontal scrollability, and ensure partial cards are clipped cleanly without showing mid-word text fragments.

issues.description: The jackpot amount displayed on 'Cop the Lot Megaways' ($6,265.28) and '3 Fiend Pots' ($13,015.14) overlap the card visuals but may not update in real-time visually, potentially showing stale data if not live-synced.
issues.suggestion: Ensure jackpot values are clearly marked as live/real-time and visually distinguish them with a pulsing or 'LIVE' badge to set user expectations.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar icons appear slightly inconsistent in size and weight compared to each other (e.g., the Casino slot icon vs. the Sports basketball icon), reducing visual cohesion.
issues.suggestion: Standardize the icon set to use uniform size, stroke weight, and style across all bottom navigation items.
